meta.title: Workout Solutions by Roy — World Class Lifestyle Coaching
meta.description: Roy Fokken — international online coach. 20+ years, 4× World Champion, World Record Benchpresser. Coaching beginners, women, kids, athletes, fighters, and actors across three continents.

hero.motto: You are born frail and weak and you will die frail and weak — what you look like in between is up to you.
hero.subline: World class coaching for everyone — first-timers, women, men, and kids; beginners, athletes, fighters, and actors. Online, from Germany to North America.
hero.ctaSub: Direct email to Roy — no funnel.

credentials.title: Two decades. Two sports. One standard.

powerlifting.title: Powerlifting
items: Powerlifting USA Magazine — Achievement Awards (165 / 132 lbs)

about.title: Born in Germany. Made on three continents.
paragraphs: Roy Fokken was born and raised in Germany, moved to North America in 1993, and is now back in Germany — coaching internationally online for clients across the USA, Canada, Mexico, and Germany.

Certified Personal Trainer with more than 20 years of experience. Four-time World Champion in powerlifting, World Record Benchpresser, NPC and NABBA titles in bodybuilding. The titles are the receipt — the work is the point.
Roy coaches the full spectrum: first-timers and lifelong lifters, women and men, kids and pros. His most loyal clients include women who came in as beginners and stayed for life.

whoRoyTrains.title: From first-timers to world champions.
whoRoyTrains.subline: Women, men, and kids. Beginners, athletes, fighters, and actors. The program meets you where you are — and pushes you further than you thought.

programTeaser.title: 12 weeks. Three phases. One transformation.
programTeaser.subline: Foundation, Build, Peak. Online coaching with direct email access to Roy, nutrition recalibration, and weekly accountability.

footer.tagline: World Class Lifestyle Coaching — international, online.

hero.title: Foundation → Build → Peak.
hero.subline: Three phases over twelve weeks. Online coaching with direct email access to Roy, weekly check-ins, and nutrition recalibration. The outline below is provisional — Roy refines each program to the individual.

program.provisionalNote: Provisional outline. Roy adjusts every phase to your starting point, goals, and feedback.

phase1.label: Phase 1
phase1.title: Foundation
bullets: Full assessment — strength, mobility, history, goals.
Form mastery on the core lifts.
Build the weekly rhythm and recovery habit.
First checkpoint at the end of Week 4.

phase2.label: Phase 2
phase2.title: Build
bullets: Progressive overload — volume and intensity step up.
Nutrition recalibration to match the new output.

phase3.label: Phase 3
phase3.title: Peak
bullets: Specialization — strength track or aesthetics track.
Peak phase tuned to your target.
Long-term roadmap for the next 12 weeks.

throughout.title: Throughout the program
items: Nutrition adjustment as the body responds.
Weekly accountability — you are not coaching yourself.
